data.title: Avetta introduces new mobile app for customers, providing access to supplier compliance information in the field. #InnovativeSolution
data.description: Avetta®, a top supplier of supply chain risk management (SCRM) software, revealed a cutting-edge mobile app designed for customers today in London. This new Avetta Mobile app enables users to access the features of Avetta Connect directly from the field. With enhanced search functionality and site-specific insights into supplier compliance and deviations, clients can quickly access vital information on any worksite. Unveiled at the Avetta Summit Series event, the app provides immediate access to crucial data, revolutionizing the way customers interact with the platform.

data.title: Klarna Card hits 1M US sign-ups in 11 weeks, offers flexible payment options to consumers in line with their needs.
data.description: In New York, Klarna, a digital bank and payments provider, revealed that more than one million Americans have registered for its Klarna Card in only 11 weeks since its launch on July 4th. This milestone demonstrates the growing preference among today's consumers for straightforward and flexible payment solutions. The Klarna Card offers users the choice to pay immediately with debit or to divide payments over a period, catering to those seeking greater control over their payment methods.

data.title: RecordPoint introduces free tool RexCommand to aid organizations in implementing AI innovation safely and rapidly.
data.description: In Seattle, RecordPoint has introduced RexCommand, a centralized hub designed to assist companies in advancing through their AI maturity journey quickly and securely. This new tool is available for free and aims to streamline the process for businesses.

data.title: EdSights secures $80M investment from JMI Equity to revolutionize student engagement and retention in higher education.
data.description: In a recent announcement in New York, EdSights, an AI-powered student voice platform, shared news of a strategic growth investment from JMI Equity, a prominent growth equity software investor. With partnerships established at over 240 universities and colleges across the country, EdSights has crafted an effective proprietary method to detect and assist students facing the risk of discontinuation, aiding educational institutions in boosting retention rates. Since its inception, EdSights has made significant strides in supporting students' academic journeys.

data.title: Oceaneering sets Q3 2025 earnings release on Oct 22 and conference call on Oct 23 in Houston.
data.description: Oceaneering, a company based in Houston, has declared the schedule for the third quarter of 2025. The earnings release is set for October 22, while the conference call will take place on October 23.

data.title: DSV to release Q3 2025 results on Oct 23, 2025. Webcast & call at 11:00 am CEST.
data.description: The interim results for Q3 2025 of DSV A/S are set to be announced on the morning of October 23, 2025. A webcast and conference call have been scheduled for 11:00 am CEST on the same day.

data.title: Circle Pharma presents CID-078, novel pediatric cancer treatment, at AACR Conference. CID-078 - first-in-class oral cyclin A/B RxL inhibitor.
data.description: In San Francisco, Circle Pharma, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, revealed that CID-078 shows promise as a new treatment for pediatric cancers. The company will present findings at the American Association for Cancer Research (AACR) Special Conference on Pediatric Cancer in Boston from September 25-28. CID-078, a novel therapeutic option, is an orally bioavailable drug and the first of its kind. This advance in targeted macrocycle therapeutics marks a significant step forward in cancer treatment research.

data.title: PROLLENIUM® named Industry Partner of the Year at Aesthetic Next 2025 in Toronto, recognized for innovation and collaboration.
data.description: A company specializing in regenerative and medical aesthetics, PROLLENIUM®, was honored with the Industry Partner of the Year award during the Aesthetic Next 2025 conference held in Toronto. This recognition highlights PROLLENIUM®’s dedication to innovation, education, and fostering partnerships within the aesthetic sector. The award is presented to the organization that has shown outstanding support and teamwork with professionals, contributing significantly to the progression of the industry.

data.title: Kosmos Energy secures $250 million senior secured term loan facility with Shell - to repay outstanding unsecured notes.
data.description: Kosmos Energy disclosed that its subsidiary, Kosmos Energy Gulf of Mexico Operations, LLC, has secured a senior secured term loan facility with Shell Trading (US) Company, providing up to $250 million. This loan is set to be funded by October 1, 2025, and will primarily go towards repaying the Company's existing unsecured notes.

data.title: Koppers Holdings Inc. (NYSE: KOP) to hold management meetings in Los Angeles on Oct. 2-3, 2025 with Leroy Ball.
data.description: On September 25, 2025, Koppers Holdings Inc. (NYSE: KOP) revealed their plans to conduct meetings with investors in Los Angeles and nearby areas on October 2-3, 2025. Leroy Ball, the Chief Executive Officer, will lead the representation of Koppers during these meetings.

data.title: Global rental genset market valued at $6.61 billion in 2024, expected to surpass $11 billion by 2034 with 5.5% CAGR growth.
data.description: In Dublin, a report on the global rental gensets industry has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The market is currently valued at $6.61 billion in 2024 and is projected to surpass $11 billion by 2034, showcasing a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 5.5%. This growth in the sector is primarily attributed to the rising need for temporary and backup power in various industries like construction, mining, oil & gas, utilities, and events. Diesel gensets continue to dominate the market, accounting for approximately 70% of the industry.

data.title: Questor wins $9M contract to supply clean combustion solutions in Mexico, aiding in reducing emissions.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta on September 25, 2025, Questor Technology Inc. announced securing a $9 million contract to provide clean combustion solutions to a major energy services company in Mexico for a three-year rental period. Trading on the TSX Venture Exchange as QST, Questor aims to help in the substantial reduction of flaring and methane emissions. The endeavor aligns with Mexico's goal to eliminate routine flaring entirely by 2030 and lower methane emissions by 30% from 2020 to 2030, in line with the Global Methane Pledge.

data.title: WuXi Biologics launches WuXia™4.0 with TrueSite TI™ platform averaging 8.0 g/L mAb titer - 99% clonal cell lines stable.
data.description: The latest generation of WuXia™ cell line platform, TrueSite TI™, utilizes a targeted integration method for efficient clone screening and maintains stable expression. This platform has demonstrated remarkable results, with an average monoclonal antibody (mAb) titer surpassing 8.0 g/L. Additionally, more than 99% of clonal cell lines have preserved their stability.
